property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.11 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25 in;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Gpg4win\..\GnuPG in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Users\mahbo\OneDrive\Bureau\apache-maven-3.9.16-bin in;C:\Users\mahbo\OneDrive\Bureau\apache-maven-3.9.16-bin\apache-maven-3.9.16 in;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\mahbo\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\CodeBlocks\MinGW in;C:\MinGW in;C:\Users\mahbo\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\mahbo\AppData\Roaming

odejs\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Nmap;C:\Users\mahbo\OneDrive\Bureau\apache-maven-3.9.16-bin in;;.
